textPlain: This page has similar visualizations and explanations of multiple (wildly different, in some cases) maze generation algorithms. It’s hypnotic to watch them run.https://professor-l.github.io/mazes/

Any discussion about Maze algorithms cannot be complete without a reference to the 1982 endless Maze algorithm used in the "Entombed" Atari game.Many great articles about this can be found like:https://www.gamesthatwerent.com/2024/01/the-endless-maze-alg...https://ieee-cog.org/2021/assets/papers/paper_215.pdf
This is what I come to HN for. Bravo
Was it the example or the text for you?
